rules.name: Cisco ASA WebVPN Exploitation Attempt
rules.author: community
rules.description: Detects exploitation patterns associated with CVE-2020-27130 path traversal in Cisco ASA/FTD WebVPN.
rules.content:
title: Cisco ASA WebVPN Path Traversal
logsource:
  category: webserver
detection:
  sel:
    cs-uri-query|contains: '+CSCOE+/'
  condition: sel
level: high

rules.name: Webshell_Generic_ASA
rules.author: community
rules.description: Generic webshell artifacts observed after CVE-2020-27130 exploitation.
rules.content: rule Webshell_Generic_ASA { strings: $a = "+CSCOE+" $b = "eval(" condition: all of them }

rules.name: ET WEB Cisco ASA Directory Traversal
rules.author: community
rules.description: Suricata signature for CVE-2020-27130 traversal over HTTP.
rules.content: alert http any any -> any any (msg:"Cisco ASA WebVPN Traversal"; content:"+CSCOE+/"; http_uri; sid:21002700; rev:1;)
